response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ year experience requirement with roughly 15 years across the stack, including recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js/React product work, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes deployment, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at his current role. A strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks) aligns well with the role's quality expectations. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin exposure) and appear learnable given his demonstrated polyglot adaptability.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with MongoDB, AWS, and Docker/Kubernetes
Direct AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong engineering-quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, code reviews, teaching, and open-source test tooling
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and limited
Named testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly listed despite broad testing background

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
